ideals: I addressed challenges with perseverance, friendship, and courage
I expressed my heritage, background, or beliefs through my actions
I used my heart rather than my head to solve a problem
system.secondWind: Regain all effort when you charge forth without a plan.

specialAbility.name: Special Ability
specialAbility.effect: When you lead a team action, get +1d on the action or increased effect.

powers.name: Strike the Road
powers.description: The first team action you lead in a session costs you 0 effort.

powers.name: Crush Limiter
powers.description: 1/session - Give your next action superpowered effect, but take a burden at the end of the scene.

powers.name: Luck as a Constant
powers.description: When you critical hit, regain all effort, heal all strain, and mark 1 xp.

powers.name: All In
powers.description: Using Aid to help a character taking a desperate action costs 0 effort for you.

powers.name: Joyluck Wind Thrower
powers.description: When you take a desperate action, you can take +1d. If you do, treat any die less than a 6 as a 1.

powers.name: The Sun
powers.description: 1/session - Gain increased effect on all actions for the rest of the scene.

powers.name: Coordinate
powers.description: Aiding you on team actions costs 0 effort.

powers.name: Heart of Hearts
powers.description: 1/session - Flash back to a scene from your past. Treat your next roll as a critical hit (6,6). Can only use three times ever.

powers.name: Team Player
powers.description: When any ally sets you up, you have increased effect on the roll.

powers.name: Brave Destiny
powers.description: 1/session - Increase the effect of the next team action you take to superpowered.

powers.name: Gambit of the Hundred Sword God
powers.description: Take a power from another Bond.

gearKits.name: Adventurer's Kit
items: Lantern, pack, bedroll, rope, flint and tinder, journal, rations, cooking pot, knife, canvas tent

gearKits.name: Brave Kit
items: Signature outfit, 3 arkentech light gems, map to a mysterious place, northstone, trinket from home, arkentech power gauntlet (single use)

gearKits.name: Explorer Kit
items: Waterproof cloak, extendable walking pole, compass, flask, three empty bottles, chalk, 6 depth stones, abyss stone (glows near monsters)

gearKits.name: Inherited Kit
items: Hexagonal key, oddly fitting clothing, antique armor piece, broken arkenrelic, heirloom weapon, memories of a prophecy
